captions.formal: Vehicles move along a multi-lane urban road lined with buildings and autumn trees under a clear sky.
captions.sarcastic: Look at all that exciting, fast-paced urban traffic, truly a thrilling spectacle.
captions.humorous_tech: This urban traffic jam is clearly experiencing a classic multi-threaded resource deadlock.
captions.humorous_non_tech: My morning commute always feels like a slow-motion race against time.

captions.formal: A small orange kitten walks forward on the dirt ground among green foliage and tree trunks.
captions.sarcastic: Clearly, this tiny kitten is on a very important mission through the dense undergrowth.
captions.humorous_tech: A new process, the kitten, navigates the complex directory structure of the undergrowth.
captions.humorous_non_tech: This little kitten is definitely on its way to find the hidden snack stash.

captions.formal: A woman is actively typing on a keyboard while observing content on a computer monitor in an office.
captions.sarcastic: Riveting screen time, I'm sure that computer monitor is just overflowing with excitement.
captions.humorous_tech: Just another day debugging the universe, one keystroke at a time on this keyboard.
captions.humorous_non_tech: Pretending to be busy at the desk, hoping no one assigns more tasks.
